title: UD DDM Records
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-extracted Universal Dependencies dependency records (5 treebanks: Arabic, Czech, German, English, Spanish) and visualizes dependency distance distributions. Parses compact input format (treebank|deprel|POS|sentLen|case) into a DataFrame, displays treebank metadata with case inventories, and plots mean dependency distance by treebank alongside case richness correlation scatter.
